_note: DUMMY SAMPLE DATA — this is NOT a real draft. `draft_status` is "dummy" so the site shows the amber sample-data banner and no one mistakes these for real picks. Engineered against the completed 2025 fixture so that at --as-of-week 6 the board exercises every state (a CLINCHED and a DEAD pick, a sub-1.0 top two, an opposite-side team share, and the under-heavy illusion where the Board-1 leader sits near the bottom of Board 2). Replace WHOLESALE at the real draft: overwrite `picks` and set `draft_status` to "final" (see README 'Replacing the dummy data'). Each manager holds EXACTLY 4 picks across 4 distinct conferences; `line` is the frozen preseason win total; direction = "O" (over) | "U" (under); store canonical team names only (§9); `manager` is the manager_id join key from config.json.
